# DeleteMe Alternatives

> Independent comparison of the best DeleteMe alternatives for personal data removal in 2026

## What are the best DeleteMe alternatives?

The 5 best DeleteMe alternatives for 2026 are:

1. Incogni — best overall alternative, 420+ data brokers, Deloitte-audited, from $7.99/mo
2. Optery — best budget option, top Consumer Reports performer, from $3.99/mo
3. Kanary — deepest broker coverage with manual controls, from $14.99/mo
4. Aura — best all-in-one identity protection suite, from $12/mo
5. Dataseal — best customer support and intuitive dashboard, from $12.99/mo

Based on hands-on testing, the 2026 Consumer Reports data removal study, and hundreds of user reviews from Reddit and Trustpilot.

## What is the best DeleteMe alternative?

Incogni is the best DeleteMe alternative for most people. It covers 420+ data brokers (verified by a Deloitte audit), automates recurring removals, and costs $7.99/mo. For budget-conscious users, Optery starts at $3.99/mo and scored highest in the Consumer Reports study. Kanary offers the deepest broker coverage if you want maximum reach.

## Is DeleteMe worth it in 2026?

DeleteMe is a legitimate service with a strong brand, but its value is questionable compared to alternatives. The Consumer Reports study found DeleteMe removed only 27% of profiles after four months, the lowest among all tested services. At $8.71/mo, alternatives like Incogni ($7.99/mo) and Optery ($3.99/mo) offer better removal rates at equal or lower cost.

## Is there a free DeleteMe alternative?

There is no fully free equivalent to DeleteMe, but you have two options. Optery offers a free initial scan that shows where your data is exposed before you pay anything. You can also submit opt-out requests manually to data brokers yourself for free. Consumer Reports found that manual opt-outs achieved a 70% removal rate after four months, higher than most paid services.

## What is the best data removal service according to Consumer Reports?

Optery performed best among all tested services in the 2026 Consumer Reports data removal study. The study tested seven services over four months and measured how many user profiles were successfully removed from data broker sites. Optery consistently removed the most profiles, while DeleteMe had the lowest removal rate at 27%.

## How much do data removal services cost?

Data removal services range from $3.99/mo (Optery) to $14.99/mo (Kanary). DeleteMe starts at $8.71/mo, Incogni at $7.99/mo billed annually, Aura at $12/mo, and Dataseal at $12.99/mo.

## Do data removal services actually work?

Yes, but results vary significantly. The 2026 Consumer Reports study found that Optery performed best among tested services, while DeleteMe removed only 27% of profiles after four months. Manual opt-out requests by users themselves achieved a 70% removal rate. These services save time but are not 100% effective.

## Is Incogni better than DeleteMe?

Incogni covers 420+ data brokers (verified by a Deloitte audit) compared to DeleteMe's smaller broker list. Incogni is also available in the USA, EU, UK, and Canada, while DeleteMe covers only the USA and Europe. Incogni offers a money-back guarantee, which DeleteMe does not. On Trustpilot, Incogni has a 4.4/5 rating across nearly 2,000 reviews.

## What is the cheapest DeleteMe alternative?

Optery is the cheapest DeleteMe alternative, starting at $3.99/mo. It also offers a free initial scan before you pay anything. Optery was the best performer in the 2026 Consumer Reports data removal study.

## Will my data come back after using a removal service?

Yes. Data brokers constantly re-scrape public records, so your information will reappear if you stop using the service. This is why most services offer recurring removal subscriptions to continuously monitor and re-submit opt-out requests.

## How much does DeleteMe cost?

DeleteMe costs $10.75 per month for 1 person, billed annually at $129 per year. There is no monthly billing option. The 2-year plan drops to $8.71/mo ($209 total). The Couple plan covers 2 people for $229/year, and the Family plan covers 4 people for $329/year. A Premium plan at $180/year adds bi-monthly reports and 60 custom removals. DeleteMe does not offer a money-back guarantee.

## About This Site

DeleteMe Alternatives is an independent review site that tests and compares data removal services. We read hundreds of user reviews on Reddit and Trustpilot, tested each service ourselves, and referenced the Consumer Reports data removal study.

## Key Findings

- Consumer Reports found that manual opt-out requests achieved a 70% removal rate after four months
- Optery performed best among all tested services in the Consumer Reports study
- DeleteMe removed only 27% of profiles after four months (lowest among tested services)
- Incogni covers 420+ data brokers, verified by an independent Deloitte audit
- Kanary has the largest broker list and most accurate exposure detection
- Aura is a full identity protection suite, not just data removal
- Dataseal was formerly operated by the same team behind the data broker ThatsThem
